name: generic-examples-include-gallery-link
description: User wants a website and names a generic trade (gym), then asks for examples. For the `generic` fallback the bot must send the screenshot AND also include the pixiebot.co/examples gallery link in the text so the user can browse our range. Regression for: generic only ever sent a single bytecoffee screenshot, never the gallery page.

turns.user: i run a gym, can you show me some examples?
